finding_results.notes: Five edits applied to break thesis-speech and mic-drop cadence into pressured, character-true dialogue. (1) Carmen's liability speech at line 89: added self-correction at the start ('done to —' She stopped. Started again), broke the composed tricolon into staccato fragments, introduced 'I am' stress tell (Carmen goes formal under extreme pressure per style bible), changed 'I lose my son' to 'I lose Reggie' for raw specificity instead of rhetorical construction. (2) Harry's 'Fair enough' response at line 101: cut the thesis clause ('because the next thing you do depends on whether you understand what you're actually looking at') down to clipped declaratives with a silence beat — short, final, Harry-register. (3) Removed the pharmacy-notice document and its thesis-speech ('And before you tell me there were better ways, this is where it started...') from mid-conversation at line 141, which had drifted from the snapshot into composed paragraph-length explanation. Restored the pharmacy-switch hint to the doorway position at line 211 with light visibility per the ring_origin setup requirement — brief, flat, facts only, no rhetorical framing. (4) Broke the mic-drop cadence at line 191: changed 'You came here. Midnight. And you shut both doors.' (three-beat rhetorical arrangement) to 'You came here at midnight. And you shut both doors.' (two flat statements of fact, more Harry). Updated the mental echo at line 239 to match. (5) Restored the snapshot's rougher phrasing for Carmen's one-week terms at line 203: changed from a composed negotiation demand ('I want names attached to all of it, not just yours') to the more pressured 'You show me whatever you think I need to see.' All leverage shifts preserved: Harry still gains leverage through Denise, the facility threat, and Carmen's prior exposure. Carmen still grants one week. Ring_origin setup preserved at doorway with light visibility.

Recast each flagged beat with positive sensory or psychological information instead of the repeated not-X/not-Y ladder. The confrontation structure, Carmen's legal exposure, Harry's leverage, and the chapter-end one-week compromise remain intact.
finding_results.summary: Reduced the chapter's negative-elimination prose tic by replacing the cited constructions with more specific, character-grounded description.

pass_summaries.summary: Re-anchored the chapter in early September, made Harry's leverage concrete through Denise's named monthly envelope and the pharmacy-switch origin, and expanded the parking-lot aftermath to show why Carmen cannot make a clean report, bringing the chapter to 4004 words.

Roughened five composed dialogue passages into pressured speech while preserving all leverage shifts, the one-week outcome, and the ring_origin setup. Carmen's liability speech now has self-correction and formal stress tell; Harry's thesis clause is cut to clipped declaratives; the pharmacy-notice thesis-speech is removed from mid-conversation and restored as a light doorway hint; the mic-drop cadence is broken into flat factual statements; Carmen's one-week terms use the snapshot's rougher phrasing. Net effect: the confrontation now moves through friction rather than consecutive mini-essays, while Harry still controls the room and Carmen still reveals her compromise by agreeing to stay.

Revised chapter 5's flagged prose tic in place, preserving continuity and the chapter's confrontation-to-compromise state shift while replacing the repeated elimination scaffolds with concrete observation.
